## Discussion

Use this code when you are able to return the guest information successfully. After creating the response object, configure values for the [doc://com.apple.sirikit/documentation/Intents/INGetRestaurantGuestIntentResponse/guest] and [doc://com.apple.sirikit/documentation/Intents/INGetRestaurantGuestIntentResponse/guestDisplayPreferences] properties before returning your response.

# INGetRestaurantGuestIntentResponseCode.success

**Case**

You successfully handled the intent.

## Declaration

```swift
case success
```

## Discussion

Use this code when you are able to return the guest information successfully. After creating the response object, configure values for the [doc://com.apple.sirikit/documentation/Intents/INGetRestaurantGuestIntentResponse/guest] and [doc://com.apple.sirikit/documentation/Intents/INGetRestaurantGuestIntentResponse/guestDisplayPreferences] properties before returning your response.

## Constants

- **INGetRestaurantGuestIntentResponseCode.failure**: You were unable to return information about the guest.

items.description: You were unable to return information about the guest.
